featuredPost2.title: Discover My Journey!

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.text: This personal webpage serves as a platform to introduce myself and provide a detailed overview of the technologies and methodologies used in its development. It reflects my technical prowess in web development, illustrating a proficient use of various tools from front to back end. For additional details, please see the GitHub account linked in the footer.

versionControlAndCiCd.title: Version Control and CI/CD
versionControlAndCiCd.text: Git with GitHub is used for version control, allowing effective management and tracking of codebase changes. A CI/CD pipeline is set up to link the GitHub repository directly to AWS. This setup automates the deployment process, where new code commits to the main branch trigger automatic Docker image creation and updates are pushed to the AWS repository.

awsInfrastructure.title: AWS Infrastructure
awsInfrastructure.text: Initially, the deployment architecture on AWS consisted of two EC2 instances with load balancing to optimize load distribution and enhance availability. Recently, I transitioned to Fargate to reduce costs while maintaining performance and scalability. An HTTPS certificate on AWS ensures that all data transferred between the user and the server is securely encrypted.

frontendDevelopment.title: Frontend Development
frontendDevelopment.text: The frontend uses Material UI templates for a modern aesthetic and was further developed in TypeScript. It is hosted on an Nginx server, chosen for its performance and reliability.

backendDevelopment.title: Backend Development
backendDevelopment.text: The backend is contained within Docker environments, promoting consistency across development and production setups. It is developed using Spring Boot and integrated with MongoDB for database management. Spring Security will be integrated in the next steps.

dockerAndContainerization.title: Docker and Containerization
dockerAndContainerization.text: Docker Compose manages the multi-container Docker applications:
dockerAndContainerization.backendService: This service is based on Spring Boot, configured with necessary environment variables for database connections, and logs directed to AWS CloudWatch for monitoring.
dockerAndContainerization.frontendService: This service handles the React-based frontend, running on Nginx, with logs also managed via AWS CloudWatch.
dockerAndContainerization.traefikService: Directs network traffic to the appropriate backend or frontend service and is configured for HTTP traffic management.

continuousMonitoringAndLoadBalancing.title: Continuous Monitoring and Load Balancing
continuousMonitoringAndLoadBalancing.text: AWS and Traefik ensure smooth traffic management and SSL/TLS configurations, with Traefik directing HTTP traffic and AWS handling HTTPS security. This strategic setup helps distribute user load and manage traffic spikes efficiently across servers.

repositoryAndCodeStructure.title: Repository and Code Structure
repositoryAndCodeStructure.text: The codebase is designed to clarify functionality and enhance maintainability:
repositoryAndCodeStructure.config: Settings for security and operational behaviors are defined here.
repositoryAndCodeStructure.controllers: These handle the logic for HTTP request and response operations.
repositoryAndCodeStructure.services: Business logic for functionalities such as user account management and blog operations is located here.
repositoryAndCodeStructure.repositories: These interact with MongoDB to manage data operations.
repositoryAndCodeStructure.models: Data structures within the application are defined in this section.

summary.title: Summary
summary.text: Designed for robustness, security, and responsiveness, this webpage leverages state-of-the-art technology in software development. It embodies my capability as a software developer, prepared to address professional challenges in the technology sector.

purpose.title: Purpose of the Website
purpose.text: This website is designed to offer insights into the construction of the site itself and to introduce you to who I am.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: Information on this website is reviewed regularly but cannot guarantee its completeness, accuracy, or currentness.
